nasb.text: Behold, while it is intact, it is not made into anything. How much less, when the fire has consumed it and it is charred, can it still be made into anything!

esv.text: Behold, when it was whole, it was used for nothing. How much less, when the fire has consumed it and it is charred, can it ever be used for anything!

cnv.text: 看哪！它完整的時候，尚且不能用來製造物件，何況它被火燒毀和燒焦了，它還能用來做甚麼呢？”

ccb.text: 它完好无损的时候，尚且不能用来制造工具，被火烧后岂不更没用了吗？
